nasb.text: But the path of the righteous is like the light of dawn, That shines brighter and brighter until the full day.

esv.text: But the path of the righteous is like the light of dawn, which shines brighter and brighter until full day.

cnv.text: 義人的路徑卻像黎明的曙光， 越來越明亮，直到日午。

ccb.text: 义人的道路好像黎明的曙光， 越照越亮，直到大放光明。

csbs.text: 但义人的路途如同黎明的光辉， 越来越亮，直到正午；
